playstyles.name: Enspell
reasons: At RDM75, Enspell is one of the four generated job lanes.
Owned gear remains hard-gated by job, level, slot, and explicit utility exclusions.

playstyles.name: MagicAccuracy
reasons: At RDM75, MagicAccuracy is one of the four generated job lanes.
Owned gear remains hard-gated by job, level, slot, and explicit utility exclusions.

playstyles.name: FastCast
reasons: At RDM75, FastCast is one of the four generated job lanes.
Owned gear remains hard-gated by job, level, slot, and explicit utility exclusions.

playstyles.name: Cure
reasons: At RDM75, Cure is one of the four generated job lanes.
Owned gear remains hard-gated by job, level, slot, and explicit utility exclusions.
RDM level is sourced from CharacterSnapshot.job_level('RDM'), not GearExport.current_job.
The first RDM build lanes are Enspell, MagicAccuracy, FastCast, Cure.
Target physical SDT can bias weapon scoring when mobdb data is available.

opportunities.actionWindow: before removing HP-positive or HP-conversion gear
opportunities.notes: Equip alternate HP support before removing volatile HP gear so current HP never exceeds the intermediate max.
opportunities.title: HP bridge swap

opportunities.actionWindow: before removing MP-positive or MP-conversion gear
opportunities.notes: Equip alternate MP support or spend MP before removing volatile MP gear.
opportunities.title: MP bridge swap

opportunities.actionWindow: when current HP or MP percent can be shaped before latent checks
opportunities.notes: Use max-pool swaps to enter or leave latent threshold bands intentionally.
opportunities.title: HP/MP threshold latent toggle

opportunities.notes: Wear Stoneskin bonus and enhancing stats for resolution, then drop unsafe pieces after the barrier is created.
opportunities.title: Stoneskin snapshot

opportunities.notes: Wear cost-reduction or no-depletion gear only while the server calculates spell cost.
opportunities.title: MP cost avoidance

opportunities.notes: Equip Cure-to-MP gear when final cure amount is known; return to safer gear after resolution.
opportunities.title: Cure-to-MP snapshot

opportunities.notes: Pulse tick gear for server ticks instead of wearing unsafe sustain gear constantly.
opportunities.title: Refresh/Regen tick pulse

opportunities.notes: Remove weapon-drawn drains and harmful latent tick gear before the tick when the action window is over.
opportunities.title: Negative tick avoidance

opportunities.actionWindow: expected incoming hit or Cover window
opportunities.notes: Wear absorption gear only for expected damage events, then return to mitigation or output gear.
opportunities.title: Damage-to-MP window

opportunities.notes: Separate cast-start reliability from landing potency so one set does not water down the other.
opportunities.title: Fast Cast precast split

opportunities.actionWindow: enhancing spell final power and duration
opportunities.notes: Route Refresh, Regen, Phalanx, Barspells, Enspells, and Aquaveil independently.
opportunities.title: Enhancing potency/duration snapshot

opportunities.notes: Pick magic accuracy against hard targets and duration/potency when landing is reliable.
opportunities.title: Enfeebling accuracy/duration split

opportunities.notes: Score the exact element, day/weather, target resistance, and burst state.
opportunities.title: Elemental nuke and magic burst routing

opportunities.notes: Use exact WS script WSC, hit count, crit flags, magical flags, and TP scaling.
opportunities.title: Weapon skill formula snapshot

opportunities.actionWindow: ranged attack start and ranged damage resolution
opportunities.notes: Keep Snapshot/Rapid Shot in preshot and damage/accuracy/Store TP in midshot.
opportunities.title: Ranged preshot/midshot split

opportunities.notes: Value Store TP by whether it changes hits or rounds to next WS.
opportunities.title: Store TP breakpoint

opportunities.notes: Too much delay reduction or Dual Wield can be wasted or reduce TP-cycle quality.
opportunities.title: Haste, Dual Wield, and Martial Arts breakpoint

opportunities.notes: When enemy TP moves are the danger, TP-feed reduction can beat raw DPS.
opportunities.title: TP feed reduction

opportunities.notes: Use enmity gear for Provoke, Flash, cures, and tank JAs, then return to mitigation.
opportunities.title: Enmity spike snapshot

opportunities.notes: Shield skill and block modifiers need separate value from generic defense or PDT.
opportunities.title: Shield block window

opportunities.notes: DNC healing should not reuse Cure spell scoring.
opportunities.title: Waltz snapshot

opportunities.notes: DNC utility actions need accuracy and finishing-move context.
opportunities.title: Step and Flourish snapshot

opportunities.notes: Quick Draw is a magic action with card/ammo and element-specific concerns.
opportunities.title: Quick Draw snapshot

opportunities.notes: Roll sets should optimize the support action, then drop back to combat or idle.
opportunities.title: Phantom Roll snapshot

opportunities.notes: Buff songs and debuff songs should not use the same scoring surface.
opportunities.title: Song instrument/duration/accuracy split

opportunities.actionWindow: Geomancy cast, luopan survival, and enfeebling landing
opportunities.notes: Separate handbell/geomancy skill, luopan durability, and caster magic accuracy.
opportunities.title: Geomancy and luopan split

opportunities.actionWindow: avatar idle or Blood Pact execution
opportunities.notes: SMN idle and Blood Pact actions need different master and pet gear priorities.
opportunities.title: Avatar perpetuation and Blood Pact split

opportunities.actionWindow: pet physical, magical, or tank action
opportunities.notes: Master gear can be optimal only if it improves the pet action currently being executed.
opportunities.title: Pet action snapshot

opportunities.notes: BLU spells are not one style; each spell family needs separate formula routing.
opportunities.title: Blue Magic physical/magical/healing split

opportunities.notes: Utsusemi recast/interruption and elemental wheel damage/accuracy need separate sets.
opportunities.title: Ninjutsu shadow and elemental split

opportunities.actionWindow: expected incoming elemental damage or RUN ability window
opportunities.notes: Elemental defense should be selected against known incoming element and target profile.
opportunities.title: Elemental defense window

opportunities.actionWindow: claim, first hit, or TH upgrade window
opportunities.notes: Wear TH only for the tag/upgrade window unless the item also wins combat scoring.
opportunities.title: Treasure Hunter tag window

opportunities.notes: Keep city/night/dusk/mount movement gear out of combat and idle scoring unless travel is selected.
opportunities.title: Movement latent routing

opportunities.notes: Food percent and cap mods must be scored against current stats and expected content duration.
opportunities.title: Food cap breakpoint
